OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS MOTION TO REOPEN DISCOVERY AND COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT TO A NEUROPSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION AND PROVIDE RESPONSES TO UNANSWERED QUESTIONS AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 63053715) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAN, YONGSHENG

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM IS ADOPTED IN FULL. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO REOPEN DISCOVERY IS DENIED; PROVIDED, HOWEVER, THAT PLAINTIFF SHOULD BE EXCLUDED FROM INTRODUCING AT TRIAL EVIDENCE OR OPINION TESTIMONY REGARDING THE EXISTENCE OF ANY ALLEGED COGNITIVE DEFICIENCY OR IMPAIRMENT NOT DISCLOSED IN HER DISCOVERY RESPONSES. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)
